title: Glycine for Sleep and Hormones After 40: What the Research Shows
tags: glycine, sleep, hormones, women over 40, collagen, amino acids, perimenopause

summary_html: Glycine is a simple amino acid found in bone broth and collagen that helps lower your core body temperature at night, supporting deeper and more restorative sleep. Research shows 3 grams before bed can improve sleep quality and next-day alertness, with extra benefits for hormonal balance and collagen production in women over 40.
seo_title: Glycine for Sleep After 40: Research, Benefits and How to Use It
seo_description: Discover how glycine for sleep works, what the research shows, and why women over 40 may need more of this simple amino acid for better rest and hormonal balance.
